mnemonics: MATPLOTLIB: My Awesome Tools Plot Lines, Titles, Images, Bars
keyPoints: Use plt.subplots() to create a figure and axes objects for precise control
Customize plots by modifying axes properties (e.g., ax.set_title(), ax.set_xlabel())
Choose appropriate plot types for your data (e.g., histograms for distributions, scatter plots for relationships)
commonMistakes: Forgot to call plt.show() to display the plot, especially in non-interactive environments
Using the wrong kind of plot for the data, like a line plot for categorical data
Creating overlapping or crowded visualizations with too much information or poor color choices
